retrieved_note: Verified against Jan-Jun 2026 KFS, conventional and Islamic SOC PDFs, AFRC, AMEX and Corporate KFS, and product pages on bankalfalah.com (verification pass 2026-05-25).

cards.card_name: Visa Classic Debit Card
notes: Card page: 'No minimum income requirement. No minimum balance requirement.'
SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec A Pt 5 Debit Card i: PKR 3,500/year basic, PKR 1,750/year supplementary (corrected from PKR 2,900).

cards.card_name: Visa Gold Debit Card
notes: Product page: 'No minimum income required for issuance.'
SOC Jan-Jun 2026: PKR 5,000/year basic, PKR 2,500/year supplementary.

cards.card_name: Visa Platinum Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec A Pt 5 Debit Card i: PKR 10,000/year basic, PKR 5,000/year supplementary (corrected from PKR 2,900 which was clearly stale).
Public product page does not publish minimum income or balance threshold.

cards.card_name: Visa Signature Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for Bank Alfalah Premier customers (PKR 3M+ relationship balance) and for Bank Alfalah Infinite customers (PKR 150M AUM).

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'Rs. 22,000/- per Signature Debit Card Per Year', supplementary Rs. 11,000/- (corrected from PKR 18,000 which was stale).
New customers route: PKR 1,000,000 deposit; existing customers: 12-month average balance of PKR 1,000,000.
Premier and Infinite tier customers get the card fee-free under the dedicated Premier / Infinite sections of the SOC.

cards.card_name: Visa Classic Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic card annual-fee reversal on PKR 70,000 eligible retail spend within 2 months; supplementary on PKR 35,000 within 2 months.

notes: Salaried min income PKR 50,000; self-employed PKR 75,000. Age 21-60 salaried; 21-70 self-employed/supplementary (we record the wider envelope).
Jan-Jun 2026 KFS: PKR 7,000 basic, PKR 3,500 supplementary annual fee.
Annual fee reversal criteria (AFRC, effective 2026-01-01): basic PKR 70,000 / supplementary PKR 35,000 in 2 months.
Removed prior 'PKR 75,000 minimum relationship balance' value: the Bank Alfalah credit card eligibility page does not publish a balance threshold (75,000 was the self-employed gross-income figure).

cards.card_name: Visa Gold Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic card annual-fee reversal on PKR 200,000 eligible retail spend within 2 months; supplementary on PKR 100,000 within 2 months.

notes: Shared eligibility grid across mainstream consumer credit cards: salaried PKR 50,000, self-employed PKR 75,000.
Jan-Jun 2026 KFS: PKR 13,000 basic / PKR 6,500 supplementary.
Removed prior 'PKR 75,000 minimum relationship balance' — same correction as Classic Credit.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah American Express Gold Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year annual fee waived for Bank Alfalah Premier Banking customers only; AMEX is explicitly NOT eligible for the standard spend-based reversal.

notes: AMEX KFS Jan-Jun 2026: 'PKR 13,000' basic, 'PKR 6,500' supplementary. '1st year's annual fee is waived for Premier Banking customers only.'
AFRC explicitly excludes AMEX: 'Bank Alfalah American Express Cardholders are not eligible for reversal under these criteria.'
Eligibility uses the shared consumer credit card grid: PKR 50,000 salaried / PKR 75,000 self-employed; ages 21-60 salaried / 21-70 self-employed.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Mastercard Optimus Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic card annual-fee reversal on PKR 300,000 eligible retail spend within 2 months; supplementary on PKR 150,000 within 2 months.

notes: KFS Jan-Jun 2026: PKR 16,000 basic / PKR 8,000 supplementary; reversal at PKR 300,000 basic / PKR 150,000 supplementary in 2 months.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Platinum Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic card annual-fee reversal on PKR 475,000 eligible retail spend within 2 months; supplementary on PKR 237,500 within 2 months.

notes: KFS: PKR 23,000 basic / PKR 11,500 supplementary; reversal at PKR 475,000 / PKR 237,500 in 2 months.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Platinum Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual and issuance fee exclusively for Premier clients; standard credit-card AFRC does not apply.

notes: Premier eligibility page: PKR 3 Million in CASA (or PKR 2M CASA + PKR 1M Bancatakaful, or PKR 10M AUM incl PKR 2M CASA) on quarterly average balance.
Card page: 'Zero annual and issuance fee exclusively for Premier clients.'
KFS lists Premier Platinum with a footnote: '*To be offered to Premier Account holders.' Confirms the card is Premier-segment.
Premier-segment card; not subject to the spend-based AFRC since base annual fee is zero.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Corporate Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Year one: no annual fee. PKR 6,000 per card applies from second year onwards.

notes: Corporate KFS Jan-Jun 2026: 'Rs. 6,000/- per card from second year onwards' (i.e., year-one free).
Eligibility uses the same consumer credit card grid: PKR 50,000 salaried / PKR 75,000 self-employed; age 21-60 salaried, 21-70 self-employed.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah PayPak Classic Debit Card
notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'Rs. 2,800/- per PayPak Debit Card Per Year', supplementary PKR 1,400.
Free under the Bank Alfalah Infinite tier (waiver of issuance, annual and replacement fee per SOC Bank Alfalah Infinite section).
Dedicated product page URL on alfalah-paypak-debit-card returned 404 at verification time.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Pehchaan Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free under the Bank Alfalah Infinite tier (PKR 150M AUM).

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'Rs. 5,000/- per Pehchaan Debit Card Per Year', supplementary Rs. 2,500/- (corrected from PKR 4,000).
Linked Pehchaan Current Account is for women and has no minimum balance requirement per the account product page.
Card-product page URL alfalah-pehchaan-debit-card returned 404 at verification time; data sourced from linked account page + SOC.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Islamic Classic Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec I Pt 1a: 'PKR 3,500/- per Classic VISA Debit Card per year'; supplementary PKR 1,750.
No income or balance threshold per card product page.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Islamic Gold Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'PKR 5,000/- per Gold VISA Debit Card per year', supplementary PKR 2,500.
Product page explicitly states no minimum income requirement.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Islamic Signature Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec I Pt 2: 'PKR 22,000/-' Signature / Power Pack Signature basic; supplementary PKR 11,000 (corrected from PKR 9,000 which was stale).
Product page: new customers PKR 1M minimum deposit; existing customers PKR 1M average 12-month balance.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Islamic Power Pack Signature Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec I Pt 2: Signature / Power Pack Signature both PKR 22,000 basic, PKR 11,000 supplementary (corrected from PKR 9,000 which referenced an outdated SOBC).
Product page: PKR 250,000 minimum deposit for new customers, or PKR 250,000 monthly average balance for existing customers.
Stale 'fee becomes payable if customer falls below Power Pack balance' waiver-rule line removed: the card now carries the full PKR 22,000 fee per the live SOC.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah PayPak Islamic Classic Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'PKR 2,800/- per Islamic PayPak Classic Debit Card per year'; supplementary PKR 1,400.
Removed previous 'Free for Alfa Payroll account holders' waiver rule: it is not present on the current product page or the Jan-Jun 2026 Islamic SOC.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Islamic Gold Women Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'PKR 5,000/- per Islamic Gold Women Debit Card per year'; supplementary PKR 2,500 (corrected from PKR 4,400 which was stale).
Product page: 'No minimum income required'. Tied to Islamic Women account which has no minimum balance.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Islamic Power Pack Women Debit Card
notes: Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026 Sec I Pt 3: 'PKR 22,000/-' Islamic Power Pack Women basic; supplementary PKR 11,000 (corrected from PKR 20,500 which was sourced from an older Islamic SOBC).
Product page: must maintain PKR 250,000 monthly average balance and hold an Islamic Women Account.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Signature Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual and issuance fee for Bank Alfalah Premier customers while Premier criteria are maintained.

notes: Premier eligibility: PKR 3 Million CASA (or PKR 2M CASA + PKR 1M Bancatakaful, or PKR 10M AUM incl 2M CASA) on quarterly average balance.
Card page: 'Zero annual and issuance fee.'
SOC 'Bank Alfalah Premier' section explicitly lists 'Premier Debit Cards' under fee waivers.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Islamic Premier Visa Signature Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual, issuance and replacement fee for Bank Alfalah Islamic Premier customers while Premier criteria are maintained.

notes: Islamic Premier card page lists no fee and requires an 'Islamic Premier Account (mandatory to apply)'. Card is fee-free for Islamic Premier customers.

Islamic Premier eligibility mirrors the conventional Premier 3M CASA / 10M AUM grid per the bankalfalah.com/premier/eligibility-criteria page (which surfaces Islamic Premier criteria); a dedicated islamic-premier/eligibility-criteria/ URL returns 404 at verification time.
Older 2022 SOBC-IB cited PKR 5M TDR alternative — kept as low-confidence note since the current Jan-Jun 2026 Islamic SOC does not republish a dedicated Islamic Premier eligibility table.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Ultra Cashback Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year annual fee waiver only, on PKR 75,000 eligible spend within 2 months; not eligible for the standard ongoing spend-based reversal.

notes: SOC Jan-Jun 2026: 'Visa Ultra Cash Back Credit Card (Issuance Fee) Rs. 10,000/-' and '(Annual Fee) Rs. 10,000/-'; supplementary PKR 5,000.
KFS Jan-Jun 2026 footnote: 'Bank Alfalah Visa Ultra Cashback Cardholders are only eligible for 1st Year Annual Fee Waivers upon spending PKR 75,000 within 2 months.'
Salaried min income PKR 50,000 (self-employed PKR 75,000); age 21-60 salaried / 21-70 self-employed.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Infinite Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual, issuance and replacement fee while Bank Alfalah Infinite criteria are maintained (PKR 150 Million AUM); falling below the quarterly average results in downgrade.

notes: Renamed from 'Bank Alfalah Islamic Premier Visa Infinite Debit Card'.
SOC 'Bank Alfalah Infinite' section: eligibility is 'PKR 150 Million AUM' quarterly average balance; 'Visa Infinite Debit Card*** - No Annual, Issuance and Replacement fee'.
Prior PKR 1,500,000 balance value was incorrect (off by 100x); prior PKR 22,000 annual fee was incorrect (Infinite tier customers pay zero).
This card is the conventional Visa Infinite debit, available to all Bank Alfalah Infinite customers regardless of Islamic/conventional flavour.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Infinite Islamic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual, issuance, replacement, and upgrade fee for Bank Alfalah Islamic Infinite customers maintaining the PKR 150 Million AUM threshold.

notes: Islamic Infinite tier proposition — separate from the Islamic Premier tier.

Islamic SOC Jan-Jun 2026 p.46 'Bank Alfalah Islamic Infinite' section: eligibility 'PKR 150 Million AUM (or FCY equivalent)' where AUM = CA + SA + Term Deposits + Islamic Mutual Fund + Sukuk/COI. The Visa Infinite Islamic Debit Card carries no annual, issuance, replacement, or upgrade fee.

Mirrors the conventional Bank Alfalah Visa Infinite Debit Card on the Islamic side. Deal-side name 'Bank Alfalah Islamic Premier Visa Infinite Debit Card' is the same Premier-vs-Infinite conflation that was caught and fixed on the conventional side; routes here, not to the Islamic Premier Visa Signature Debit Card.
Added 2026-05-25 from BAFL Islamic SOC investigation; no dedicated marketing product page exists on bankalfalah.com (parallel to conventional Infinite).

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Top Tier Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual, issuance and replacement fee for Bank Alfalah Premier customers maintaining the PKR 25 Million Current Account threshold.

notes: Renamed from 'Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Infinite Debit Card' (was incorrectly labelled).

SOC 'Bank Alfalah Premier > Consumer Finance' section: 'Premier Visa Top Tier Debit Card*** - Eligibility criteria for availing this card is PKR 25 Million in Current Account or equivalent in foreign currency.'
Prior PKR 1,500,000 balance and PKR 22,000 annual fee were both wrong: this is the Premier top-tier card and is fee-free for qualifying Premier customers.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Signature Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero annual, issuance and replacement fee for Bank Alfalah Premier customers maintaining the PKR 25 Million Current Account threshold.

notes: Renamed from 'Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Infinite Credit Card' (was incorrectly labelled — there is no Premier Visa Infinite credit card in the SOC).

SOC 'Bank Alfalah Premier > Consumer Finance' section: 'Premier VISA Signature Credit Card*** - Eligibility criteria for availing this card is PKR 25 Million in Current Account or equivalent in foreign currency.'

Annual fee PKR 30,000 / supplementary PKR 15,000 appears in Section A under Signature Card — but the Premier section overrides this with a full waiver for qualifying Premier customers (the only way to obtain the card).

gaps: Mastercard Titanium credit card was discontinued and the record was removed from this pilot on 2026-05-25. Probable historical replacement: Mastercard Optimus.

Islamic Premier Visa Signature Debit Card: no dedicated Islamic Premier eligibility URL is currently live; conventional Premier eligibility criteria (3M CASA / 10M AUM) are used as the Islamic Premier equivalent based on the parent Premier eligibility page.
Debit-card age requirements are not published by Bank Alfalah for the standard debit family; salary/age age-bracket data is only published for the credit card eligibility table.
